title: Alaskan Wilderness Reimagined - ForgeLabs Recreation [AWR]
description: v3.2 Now with Tower Generation in custom worlds!
body: --- # Pack No Longer Mainteined on Modrinth # CurseForge Recommended > _3.5 **New Tower Generation** now available only on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/alaskan-wilderness-reimagined)_ --- # 🏰 THE TOWER This pack comes with a **premade world**, including the tower from the video. You can also create your own world and **spawn right under the tower** Not happy with the spawn? Don’t worry — you can always make a new world exactly how you want it. ![Tower Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6942b54931a2df59b1733507aaa999af9f739af9_0.webp) ![Tower Closeup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbaf861dfe7e644bed106e8b3ae052bbcbb9222c_0.webp) _Terrain has been completely reworked._ _Features dense forests, rivers, mountains, and smaller plains._ --- # 📖 GUIDE > For basics needed to survive, please refer to the linked video showcasing the modpack and use the /guide command in game > Still need more help? Join our Discord for tips and support. --- # ✨ ENHANCEMENTS > Pack contains more immersive and fun mods to discover, such as: > - Cameras & photography > - Painting > - Better caves & underground geysers > - Improved rain/snow effects > - Waves & water physics > - Butchery and other gameplay features > And more surprises waiting for you!
